name: autonomous-finance
description: Financial nervous system for the agentic economy — typed primitives (Money/Cost/Card/Account/Ledger/OutcomeContract/SLAPolicy) + provider adapters (Stripe, Tempo, x402, Privy, Lightspark) + canonical catalog of finance Services (bookkeeper, controller, AP, AR, tax, treasury, payroll).
